query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "occ-rag: optimal cognitive core for faithful question answering" linguistics
rationale: The paper focuses on security vulnerabilities (membership inference attacks) in Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems, whereas the user's question targets the linguistic mechanisms of "OCC-RAG" for faithful question answering. While both involve RAG, the paper does not measure the same biological/algorithmic mechanism, variables, or domain as the user's specific inquiry into the "Optimal Cognitive Core" framework, nor does it serve as a foundational reference for that specific linguistic
